title: 信息日报 2026-06-18

headline.title: GLM-5.2：全球最强纯文本开源大模型发布
headline.summary: 中国AI实验室Z.ai于6月16日发布GLM-5.2，参数规模753B，采用混合专家架构（MoE），激活参数40B，模型权重1.51TB，以MIT许可完全开源。该模型仅支持文本输入，在多项基准测试中表现优异，被认为是当前最强大的纯文本开源大模型。
headline.title_en: GLM-5.2: Most powerful text-only open weights LLM released
headline.summary_en: Chinese AI lab Z.ai released GLM-5.2 on June 16, a 753B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 40B active parameters and 1.51TB weights, under MIT license. Text-only input, it is considered the most powerful open weights LLM for text tasks.
headline.original_title: GLM-5.2 is probably the most powerful text-only open weights LLM
headline.reason: GLM-5.2的发布标志着开源大模型领域的重大突破，其规模与性能均达到新高度，对全球AI研究与开发具有深远影响。
headline.reason_en: GLM-5.2's release marks a breakthrough in open-source LLMs, with unprecedented scale and performance, significantly impacting global AI research and development.
